query: Uganda Ebola Bundibugyo virus outbreak confirmed case count latest update late June and July 2026. Have any new cases been reported after 21 June 2026 bringing Uganda total above 20? Check ECDC CDTR Week 27, WHO Disease Outbreak News.
answer:
Research complete. Summary of findings:

**No new Uganda cases have been reported after 21 June 2026. Uganda's confirmed Bundibugyo Ebola total remains at 20 — it has NOT risen above 20.**

Key verification across all requested sources:
- **WHO DON612 (published 3 July 2026):** 20 Uganda confirmed cases, 2 deaths; most recent case identified 21 June 2026.
- **ECDC live outbreak page (updated 9 July 2026):** Uganda 20 confirmed / 2 deaths / 16 recovered; explicitly states the last case was 21 June and none since.
- **ECDC CDTR Week 27 (27 June–3 July 2026):** Ebola update consistent with the 20-case figure.

Context: The rapid escalation is entirely on the DRC side (~1,759–1,792 confirmed / 600–625 deaths as of 8 July), not Uganda. A separate Marburg outbreak was reported by Uganda ~30 June 2026, which is distinct from the Ebola count.

sources.title: Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus, Democratic Republic of the Congo & Uganda (DON612)
sources.snippet: In total, 1481 confirmed cases; 1460 from DRC, 20 from Uganda and one from France; 454 deaths including two from Uganda. Most recent Uganda case identified 21 June 2026. Published 3 July 2026.

sources.title: Ebola disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda
sources.snippet: Last updated 9 July 14:48. Uganda: 20 confirmed cases, 2 deaths, 16 recovered. Last confirmed case reported 21 June; no new cases reported since.

sources.title: Communicable disease threats report, 27 June - 3 July 2026, Week 27
sources.snippet: Weekly CDTR bulletin covering 27 June - 3 July 2026 including Ebola update; consistent with Uganda 20-case figure.

sources.title: Disease Outbreak News: Ebola Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (3 July 2026)
sources.snippet: As of 2 July, Uganda reported 20 confirmed cases including two deaths, plus one probable case who died.

sources.title: 2026 Ebola epidemic
sources.snippet: There have been 625 confirmed deaths in DRC and two deaths in Uganda as of the second week of July.

sources.title: Bundibugyo virus disease updates - NICD
sources.snippet: As of 8 July 2026, 1792 lab-confirmed cases including 625 deaths reported across Ituri, North Kivu and South Kivu in DRC.
